side_effects.description: Vasovagal syncope - blacked out for approximately 20 seconds after injection, likely triggered by pain, difficulty inserting needle, and sight of blood; regained consciousness within a minute
Bleeding at injection site; needle harder to break through skin than usual and more painful than typical

protocol_notes: On week 4 of retatrutide. Had just increased dose by 0.5mg. Incident likely related to hitting a firm spot or poor injection technique in combination with dose increase. OP notes prior injections had been uneventful.
